\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5503 introduces Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega_{\mathrm{eff}}^2=\omega_0^2+\Gamma. \label{eq:omega_eff} \end{equation}
